# Disclaimer

These pages  provide <span class="footeremph">unofficial and preliminary</span> information as it is being developed the various journals' Data Editors.
No information should be construed as official policy of any of the participating journals. Please see the respective journal pages for official policy.

This site does not provide legal guidance. The information provided is meant for discussion and as a suggestion only. Authors should consult with a qualified party, such as a university counsel or a lawyer, as appropriate.
